description: MCP-inspired tool/API configuration for the HR chatbot. Each tool defines a capability the chatbot can invoke to fetch dynamic data.

tools.name: get_vacation_balance
tools.description: Get the current vacation day balance for the logged-in employee. Use when the user asks about vacation days, time off remaining, PTO balance, or how many days they have left.

employee_id.description: Employee ID. Defaults to logged-in user (E001).

tools.name: get_upcoming_holidays
tools.description: Get upcoming public holidays. Use when the user asks about public holidays, bank holidays, or national days off.

country.description: ISO country code e.g. 'DE' for Germany. Defaults to 'DE'.

tools.name: get_learning_budget
tools.description: Get the remaining learning & development budget. Use when the user asks about training budget, L&D, conference budget, or money left for courses or books.

employee_id.description: Employee ID. Defaults to logged-in user (E001).

tools.name: get_employee_info
tools.description: Get general employee information: department, start date, manager, job grade. Use for questions like 'who is my manager?' or 'when did I start?'.

employee_id.description: Employee ID. Defaults to logged-in user (E001).
